query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS capture_policies (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  scope ENUM('project', 'campaign', 'scenario') NOT NULL,
  scope_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  policy_json JSON,
  created_by VARCHAR(64),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_capture_policies_uid (uid),
  INDEX idx_capture_policies_scope (scope, scope_id),
  INDEX idx_capture_policies_created (created_at DESC, uid)
);

  uid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  scope ENUM('project', 'campaign', 'scenario') NOT NULL,

  created_by VARCHAR(64),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,

  UNIQUE KEY uq_capture_policies_uid (uid),
  INDEX idx_capture_policies_scope (scope, scope_id),
  INDEX idx_capture_policies_created (created_at DESC, uid)
);
